title: CI: bump VMs
body:
* pasta 2024-03-20 on all Fedoras
* crun 1.14.4 everywhere

See https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/337#issuecomment-2010128930

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```
